proposedStrategy.literal: Create a visual proof materializer strategy plan that authorizes schemas, projection manifests, SEJ/SOG execution, ASCII and HTML proof surfaces, and receipts from one promoted visual model.

strategyIntent.literal: Authorize the visual proof materializer artifact cluster so one promoted visual model can project reviewable ASCII and HTML evidence through resolver-mediated JSON execution.

literal.whichStoryRequiredThis: The operator CLI story for a visual proof materializer strategy.
literal.whichSogOwnsBehavior: contracts/semantic-operation-graphs/projections/visual-proof-materialize.sog.v1.json for materialization proof; durable behavior still requires SOG promotion evidence.

literal: provider evidence exists before candidate hardening

strategy plan is durable product truth

completionPosture.literal: The strategy plan authorizes the visual proof materializer artifact cluster while leaving behavior truth to resolver-mediated SOG execution and promotion evidence.

content: # Slice 056 - semantic strategy plan authorizes visual proof materializer
Requires SOG promotion for behavior: true
The strategy plan explains why the visual proof materializer artifact cluster exists. It does not claim durable product truth. Behavior remains owned by SOG execution and promotion evidence.

content.completionPosture: The semantic strategy compile run materialized strategy authority, bounded manifest, handoff packets, and receipts without claiming durable product truth.
